final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses according to the effective interest method from interest-bearing liabilities recognized at amortized cost

variables.notes: R:nc. The candidate list misses the most appropriate debt-interest row: 'Interest expenses according to the effective interest method from interest-bearing liabilities recognized at amortized cost'. I selected that row plus 'Interest expenses on lease' as recurring financing costs, while excluding broader 'Financial expenses' because it includes FX/derivative items. Manual review is recommended because one selected row is outside the candidate list and classification of lease interest can be policy-sensitive. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest expenses according to the effective interest method from interest-bearing liabilities recognized at amortized cost
